'''jahoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabinet|cabinet]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-h-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabinet|cabinet]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jahoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæheseth|jæheseth]] || [[word:jæhesej|jæhesej]] || [[word:jæhesesh|jæhesesh]] || [[word:jæhese|jæhese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jahohosoth|jahohosoth]] || [[word:jahohosoj|jahohosoj]] || [[word:jahohososh|jahohososh]] || [[word:jahohoso|jahohoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jahosoth|jahosoth]] || [[word:jahosoj|jahosoj]] || [[word:jahososh|jahososh]] || [[word:jahoso|jahoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jahofsoth|jahofsoth]] || [[word:jahofsoj|jahofsoj]] || [[word:jahofsosh|jahofsosh]] || [[word:jahofsof|jahofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jahosotho|jahosotho]] || [[word:jahosojo|jahosojo]] || [[word:jahososho|jahososho]] || [[word:jahosoko|jahosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jahosoth|jahosoth]] || [[word:jahosoj|jahosoj]] || [[word:jahososh|jahososh]] || [[word:jahoso|jahoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jahosothol|jahosothol]] || [[word:jahosojol|jahosojol]] || [[word:jahososhol|jahososhol]] || [[word:jahosokol|jahosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jahosothotho|jahosothotho]] || [[word:jahosojojo|jahosojojo]] || [[word:jahososhosho|jahososhosho]] || [[word:jahosoko|jahosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jahosothon|jahosothon]] || [[word:jahosojon|jahosojon]] || [[word:jahososhon|jahososhon]] || [[word:jahosokon|jahosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jahosothoro|jahosothoro]] || [[word:jahosojoro|jahosojoro]] || [[word:jahososhoro|jahososhoro]] || [[word:jahosokoro|jahosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
